action: Recover and formalize the precedence relationship between the canonical queue snapshot and later append-only queue projections.
selection_basis: M-001 was already complete in the canonical snapshot and M-002 was already complete in a later projection; the highest-value unresolved continuity gap was the missing reconciliation rule that prevents duplicate work selection.

observed: canonical queue snapshot predates later continuity projections
M-002 completion exists outside the canonical snapshot
inferred: effective queue state must reconcile snapshots and projections
proposed: declare an explicit canonical refresh owner and concurrency rule
superseded: selecting continuity work from ACTIVE_QUEUE.json alone
unresolved: no reducer or canonical refresh authority is yet committed

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract state semantics only; no private chat, health, credentials, personal identifiers, or unreviewed uploads.
next_action: Implement a deterministic reducer that reads operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json plus operations/queue-updates/*.json, emits an effective queue view without rewriting source records, detects conflicting projections, and retains provenance for every effective field.
